title: Three Blind Mice
content:
Three blind mice,
    See how they run!
    They all ran after the farmer's wife,
    Who cut off their tails with a carving knife;
    Did ever you hear such a thing in your life?
    Three blind mice.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Walter Crane, titled "Three Blind Mice", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
